detail_text: Quality Craftsmanship The set is made with high-quality materials and skilled craftsmanship, ensuring durability and longevity. Fashionable Style With its Korean-style design and sweet princess flair, this set is sure to make your child stand out in the crowd. Adorable Design Featuring a cute bear design, this set is not only functional but also adds a touch of cuteness to your child's winter wardrobe. Suitable for All Ages With sizes available for children aged 6 months to 6 years, this set is a great investment for growing kids. Versatile Use Designed for both boys and girls, this set is perfect for various occasions, whether it's for playtime or special events.

product.desc:
Quality Craftsmanship



The set is made with high-quality materials and skilled craftsmanship, ensuring durability and longevity.






Fashionable Style



With its Korean-style design and sweet princess flair, this set is sure to make your child stand out in the crowd.






Adorable Design



Featuring a cute bear design, this set is not only functional but also adds a touch of cuteness to your child's winter wardrobe.






Suitable for All Ages



With sizes available for children aged 6 months to 6 years, this set is a great investment for growing kids.






Versatile Use



Designed for both boys and girls, this set is perfect for various occasions, whether it's for playtime or special events.

title: Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Baby & Toddler Socks | Cotton Anti-Slip Grip for Crawling, Walking & Playtime
detail_text: 🧦 Safe, Comfy & Stylish Socks for Little Explorers! The Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Baby & Toddler Socks are designed for comfort, confidence, and safety — perfect for babies learning to crawl or toddlers taking their first steps. Made with soft breathable cotton and secure anti-slip soles, they keep little feet cozy and steady all day long. 🌟 Why Parents Love Them 👣 Non-Slip Safety Grip – Anti-slip dots prevent slipping on tiles or wood floors. 🧸 Soft & Breathable Cotton – Gentle on delicate baby skin and keeps feet dry. 🎨 Stylish Neutral Colors – Matches easily with any outfit, from homewear to outings. 🌈 Stretchy & Comfortable Fit – Flexible cuff stays on without leaving marks. 🧩 Everyday Essential – Great for crawling, walking, daycare, or indoor playtime. 🏠 Real-Life Use Scenarios 👶 First Steps at Home: Keeps your baby safe on slippery floors. 🧸 Daycare & Playdates: Durable comfort for busy toddlers. 🏡 Indoor Playtime: Prevents falls during learning and play. ✈️ Travel & Outings: Easy to pack and wear anywhere. 💡 Parents love how these socks stay on securely — no more lost socks or slippery feet! 📏 Size Guide (Foot Length) S (6–18 months): 9–12 cm M (18 months–3.5 years): 12–14 cm L (3–5 years): 14–16 cm Tip: Measure your child’s foot for the best fit! 📦 What’s Included 1 × Pair of Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Cotton Socks 📌 Highlights 🧦 Soft cotton baby & toddler socks 👣 Anti-slip grip for safe walking 🌿 Breathable & skin-friendly fabric 🎨 Stylish neutral colors for any outfit 🇸🇬 Perfect for Singapore homes & daycare #LilCurators #BabySocks #ToddlerSocks #NonSlipSocks #AntiSlipBabySocks #BabyEssentials #ParentingHacks #SGLocalSeller #ReadyStock #FastDelivery 👉 Give your child the confidence to take every step safely. Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Socks — soft, stylish, and steady for happy little feet.
detail_html:
🧦 Safe, Comfy & Stylish Socks for Little Explorers!

The Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Baby & Toddler Socks are designed for comfort, confidence, and safety — perfect for babies learning to crawl or toddlers taking their first steps.

Made with soft breathable cotton and secure anti-slip soles, they keep little feet cozy and steady all day long.

🌟 Why Parents Love Them

👣 Non-Slip Safety Grip – Anti-slip dots prevent slipping on tiles or wood floors.

🧸 Soft & Breathable Cotton – Gentle on delicate baby skin and keeps feet dry.

🎨 Stylish Neutral Colors – Matches easily with any outfit, from homewear to outings.

🌈 Stretchy & Comfortable Fit – Flexible cuff stays on without leaving marks.

🧩 Everyday Essential – Great for crawling, walking, daycare, or indoor playtime.

🏠 Real-Life Use Scenarios

👶 First Steps at Home: Keeps your baby safe on slippery floors.

🧸 Daycare & Playdates: Durable comfort for busy toddlers.

🏡 Indoor Playtime: Prevents falls during learning and play.

✈️ Travel & Outings: Easy to pack and wear anywhere.

💡 Parents love how these socks stay on securely — no more lost socks or slippery feet!

📏 Size Guide (Foot Length)

S (6–18 months): 9–12 cm

M (18 months–3.5 years): 12–14 cm

L (3–5 years): 14–16 cm

Tip: Measure your child’s foot for the best fit!

📦 What’s Included

1 × Pair of Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Cotton Socks

📌 Highlights

🧦 Soft cotton baby & toddler socks

👣 Anti-slip grip for safe walking

🌿 Breathable & skin-friendly fabric

🎨 Stylish neutral colors for any outfit

🇸🇬 Perfect for Singapore homes & daycare

#LilCurators #BabySocks #ToddlerSocks #NonSlipSocks #AntiSlipBabySocks #BabyEssentials #ParentingHacks #SGLocalSeller #ReadyStock #FastDelivery

👉 Give your child the confidence to take every step safely.

Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Socks — soft, stylish, and steady for happy little feet.

Made with soft breathable cotton and secure anti-slip soles, they keep little feet cozy and steady all day long. 🌟 Why Parents Love Them 👣 Non-Slip Safety Grip – Anti-slip dots prevent slipping on tiles or wood floors. 🧸 Soft & Breathable Cotton – Gentle on delicate baby skin and keeps feet dry. 🎨 Stylish Neutral Colors – Matches easily with any outfit, from homewear to outings. 🌈 Stretchy & Comfortable Fit – Flexible cuff stays on without leaving marks. 🧩 Everyday Essential – Great for crawling, walking, daycare, or indoor playtime. 🏠 Real-Life Use Scenarios 👶 First Steps at Home: Keeps your baby safe on slippery floors. 🧸 Daycare & Playdates: Durable comfort for busy toddlers. 🏡 Indoor Playtime: Prevents falls during learning and play. ✈️ Travel & Outings: Easy to pack and wear anywhere. 💡 Parents love how these socks stay on securely — no more lost socks or slippery feet! 📏 Size Guide (Foot Length) S (6–18 months): 9–12 cm M (18 months–3.5 years): 12–14 cm L (3–5 years): 14–16 cm Tip: Measure your child’s foot for the best fit! 📦 What’s Included 1 × Pair of Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Cotton Socks 📌 Highlights 🧦 Soft cotton baby & toddler socks 👣 Anti-slip grip for safe walking 🌿 Breathable & skin-friendly fabric 🎨 Stylish neutral colors for any outfit 🇸🇬 Perfect for Singapore homes & daycare #LilCurators #BabySocks #ToddlerSocks #NonSlipSocks #AntiSlipBabySocks #BabyEssentials #ParentingHacks #SGLocalSeller #ReadyStock #FastDelivery 👉 Give your child the confidence to take every step safely. Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Socks — soft, stylish, and steady for happy little feet.

product.desc:
🧦 Safe, Comfy & Stylish Socks for Little Explorers!

The Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Baby & Toddler Socks are designed for comfort, confidence, and safety — perfect for babies learning to crawl or toddlers taking their first steps.

Made with soft breathable cotton and secure anti-slip soles, they keep little feet cozy and steady all day long.

🌟 Why Parents Love Them

👣 Non-Slip Safety Grip – Anti-slip dots prevent slipping on tiles or wood floors.

🧸 Soft & Breathable Cotton – Gentle on delicate baby skin and keeps feet dry.

🎨 Stylish Neutral Colors – Matches easily with any outfit, from homewear to outings.

🌈 Stretchy & Comfortable Fit – Flexible cuff stays on without leaving marks.

🧩 Everyday Essential – Great for crawling, walking, daycare, or indoor playtime.

🏠 Real-Life Use Scenarios

👶 First Steps at Home: Keeps your baby safe on slippery floors.

🧸 Daycare & Playdates: Durable comfort for busy toddlers.

🏡 Indoor Playtime: Prevents falls during learning and play.

✈️ Travel & Outings: Easy to pack and wear anywhere.

💡 Parents love how these socks stay on securely — no more lost socks or slippery feet!

📏 Size Guide (Foot Length)

S (6–18 months): 9–12 cm

M (18 months–3.5 years): 12–14 cm

L (3–5 years): 14–16 cm

Tip: Measure your child’s foot for the best fit!

📦 What’s Included

1 × Pair of Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Cotton Socks

📌 Highlights

🧦 Soft cotton baby & toddler socks

👣 Anti-slip grip for safe walking

🌿 Breathable & skin-friendly fabric

🎨 Stylish neutral colors for any outfit

🇸🇬 Perfect for Singapore homes & daycare

#LilCurators #BabySocks #ToddlerSocks #NonSlipSocks #AntiSlipBabySocks #BabyEssentials #ParentingHacks #SGLocalSeller #ReadyStock #FastDelivery

👉 Give your child the confidence to take every step safely.

Lil’ Curators Non-Slip Socks — soft, stylish, and steady for happy little feet.

title: 5pcs Baby Saliva Towel Triangle Scarf Pure Cotton Bandana Waterproof Bibs Newborn Boys Girls Absorbent Cloth Bib Saliva Scarf
detail_text: Specifications SKU3041107100_SGAMZ-20749608625PatternCartoonAccessory TypeScarves & ShawlsClothing Material100% CottonStylefashion Highlights The 5pcs Baby Saliva Towel Triangle Scarf is a must-have accessory for newborns. Made of pure cotton, it is soft and gentle on your baby's delicate skin. With its waterproof feature, it keeps your baby's clothes clean and dry during mealtime or teething. The absorbent cloth effectively absorbs drool and spit-up, keeping your baby comfortable and dry. Suitable for both boys and girls, this unisex scarf is a practical and stylish addition to your baby's wardrobe. Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here VIEW MORE
